canvas-muted.$description: Action canvas on hover — M3 filled button + 8% on-primary state layer.

canvas-subtle.$description: Action canvas when active/pressed — M3 filled button + 12% on-primary state layer.

ink.$description: Base action ink — M3 primary (links, text buttons).

ink-subtle.$description: Soft action ink — M3 primary tone 50.

ink-muted.$description: Muted action ink — M3 primary tone 60.
